verses.text: Sangpenpa aw, Topa tungah lungdamna lah ding, nangma min phatna la sak dingin kilawm a, zangsawm khausai lasakna leh harp lasakna, laia lasaknate tumin, zingsangin nangma itna kip, zanin na thumanna genkhiat dingin a kilawm ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangma sepna tawh kei nong lungdamsak a, nangma sepnate hangin lungdamin la ka sa hi
Topa aw, na nasepnate lian mahmah a, na ngaihsutnate thuk mahmah hi

Migilote, lopa bangin selkhia-in, siatna bawl khempeuh a pun' mahmah hangun, a tawntungin siatna a thuak ding uh ahi hi. Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang pen a sangna-ah a omden na hihna thu, lungsimmawl mi in thei theilo a, lungsim teilo mi in tel theilo hi
Topa aw, na galte si ta ding! Bang hang hiam cih leh na galte beimang ding a, siatna a bawl khempeuhte kithehthang ding uh hi
Ahih hangin nangmah in zangsial bangin kei na hong hatsak a, kei thupha hong pia-in nong lungdamsak hi
Ka galte' pukna ka mit in mu khinta a, keimah a hong do a gilote' siatna ka bil in za khinta hi
Nisuh kung bangin thuman mi palh a, Lebanon mualtunga om taamtak kung bangin a khang hi
Topa' inn sungah amaute kisuan a, i Pasian' huangsungah amaute palh uh hi
Topa thutang hi, ci-in a lahna dingun amaute teek napi-in gah lailai uh a, amaute tui kiuhkeuhin hing sitset uh hi. Amah pen kei hong hupa hi a, ama sungah thumanlohna omlo hi.
